title: Cram Schools Teachers Say, You Don't Have to Get a 100, 70's Enough.
overview: Principal Hata challenges their teacher Ginpachi to have every student score over 80 in a test otherwise the class faces remedial lessons and Ginpachi gets a pay cut. Ginpachi and his students decide to do a cheating plan.

title: People Can Change How They Look But Not Who They Are / No Matter How Old You Get, Tests Always Suck / When You Ask Someone for Advice, You Usually Know the Solution Yourself Deep Down
overview: Ginpachi arrives at his class and sees that his students change based on what he says.

title: When the Quiet Kid Cracks a Joke, It's Hard to React, but You Can't Ignore It, so All You Can Do Is Laugh
overview: Takasugi Shinsuke is back after a long suspension. But he doesn't seem to be the biggest problem...

title: Horror and Comedy Are Two Sides of the Same Coin
overview: Late at night, Shinpachi goes back to school for something forgotten and runs into Kagura and Ginpachi. Shinpachi recalls the "Seven wonders". Ginpachi laughs it off, but suddenly a mysterious voice echoes from the empty room.

title: It's Nice Having a Party Member Who Can Use Safe Passage
overview: Three bank robbers are hiding in the school and Hata decides to offer a reward for them.

title: Everyone Fantasizes a Little Bit About Transferring Because of Their Dad's Job
overview: Sakata Ginpachi, Class 3-Z’s eccentric homeroom teacher, tries to guide his equally eccentric students!

title: Spent Too Much Time Reading Old Copies of Jump and Didn't Get Much Cleaning Done
overview: The students of class 3-Z start doing a general cleaning of the school.

title: They Say Nobody'll Ever Know if You Embarrass Yourself on a Holiday, but Nobody Wants to Embarrass Themselves in the First Place
overview: Class 3-Z goes on a school trip to Kyoto, and Hijikata tries to make sure everyone follows the rules.

title: You Say School Festivals Suck, but You're Enjoying Yourself, Aren't You?
overview: The school festival is coming, and all the problems that come with it.

title: Not Everything's Better Short
overview: The gang members of class 3-Z become involved in the monk pants raid that affects all of Kabukicho.

title: Whoever Shows Up Late On Purpose to Stand Out Deserves a Dropkick
overview: Kamui decides to confront Takasugi and the other gang members from Gintama High School to settle everything once and for all.

title: Old Times Talk in Reunions and Last Episode Recaps in Anime Are Just Filler for When You Have Nothing to Show or Talk About
overview: Some time after graduating, Shinpachi decides to organize a reunion with the former students of class 3-Z.
